---
title: "Hypothetical Example 3 - Regions of Significance"
author: "Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Hypothetical Example 3 - Regions of Significance}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---





## Knowledge mediates the association between marital conflict and behavioral competence

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-direct-delta-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-direct-mc-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-indirect-delta-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-indirect-mc-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-total-delta-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-total-mc-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-direct-delta-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-direct-mc-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-indirect-delta-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-indirect-mc-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-total-delta-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xmy-total-mc-500-1.png" width="1700" />

## Behavioral competence mediates the association between marital conflict and knowledge

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-direct-delta-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-direct-mc-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-indirect-delta-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-indirect-mc-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-total-delta-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-total-mc-100-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-direct-delta-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-direct-mc-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-indirect-delta-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-indirect-mc-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-total-delta-500-1.png" width="1700" />

<img src="fig-vignettes-example-3-xym-total-mc-500-1.png" width="1700" />
